display.purpose: Product name only. Heavy display grotesque.

body.purpose: Default reading voice: node labels, buttons, inputs, settings.

mono.purpose: Counts, depths, tabs, JSON, hex, hints.

shadows.name: board
shadows.purpose: Resting lift for the two large work boards (canvas, panes).

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Stronger lift for transient floating layers (color/style popover).

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Lime emission under the brand mark only.

shadows.name: selected-ring
shadows.purpose: Inset lime ring for selected node and focused pane.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus (expressed as outline: 2px solid accent, offset 1px).

motion.name: control
motion.purpose: Default state transition for buttons, swatches, toggles (background/color/border).

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Hover reveals: grip, row actions, chevron rotation.

motion.name: switch-knob
motion.purpose: The only spring in the system: the switch knob travel.

breakpoints.name: stack
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, the canvas + right rail collapse from side-by-side to a single scrolling column.

layout.shell: Full-height flex column: header (fixed) + tab bar (fixed) + main (grid: minmax(0,1fr) canvas area / 384px right rail, 18px gap, 18px padding).
layout.panes: The canvas area is a flex container; single fills, vertical split = row, horizontal split = column, 18px gap.
layout.indent: Tree indentation is 22px per level; row height 42px.
layout.rightRail: 384px fixed column of bordered sections, 14px vertical gaps, independently scrolling.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Dominant action, one per context (add root node, apply import).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #0a0d13; background: #c8f750; border: 1px solid #c8f750; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.14s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #d4ff63; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c8f750; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Secondary action: elevated fill, hairline border, dim text.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #aeb8c8; background: #19212f; border: 1px solid #232b3b; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.14s ease, color 0.14s ease, border-color 0.14s ease; } .ds-btn:hover { background: #1f2838; color: #e7ebf2; border-color: #2d384c; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action (delete, clear). Translucent danger wash.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #fb7185; background: rgba(251,113,133,0.08); border: 1px solid #5a2b35; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.14s ease; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: rgba(251,113,133,0.16); }

components.name: Metadata Chip
components.description: Read-only mono badge for counts and depths.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 22px; padding: 0 9px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #aeb8c8; background: #19212f; border: 1px solid #232b3b; border-radius: 99px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Recessed Input
components.description: Data-entry field cut into the surface; lime border on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 36px; padding: 0 11px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #e7ebf2; background: #0a0d13; border: 1px solid #232b3b; border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.13s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #c8f750; }

components.name: Active Tab
components.description: Folder tab with lime icon and bottom lime underline when active.
components.html: Árbol 1
components.css: .ds-tab { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; height: 34px; padding: 0 8px 0 11px; background: #141a26; color: #e7ebf2; border: 1px solid #2d384c; border-bottom: none; border-radius: 9px 9px 0 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tab__name { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-tab::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: -1px; height: 2px; background: #c8f750; }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: On-state uses a lime wash, lime border and lime knob with a slight overshoot.
components.css: .ds-switch { position: relative; width: 44px; height: 26px; border-radius: 99px; background: #19212f; border: 1px solid #232b3b; cursor: pointer; } .ds-switch__knob { position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; background: #71809a; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1), background 0.18s ease; } .ds-switch--on { background: rgba(200,247,80,0.2); border-color: #c8f750; } .ds-switch--on .ds-switch__knob { transform: translateX(18px); background: #c8f750; }

components.name: Tree Node Row (selected)
components.description: Selected node: lime tint + inset lime ring, color dot, rotating chevron, mono count.
components.html: Plataforma2
components.css: .ds-node { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 42px; padding: 0 8px 0 12px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(200,247,80,0.08); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(200,247,80,0.35); } .ds-node__chev { transform: rotate(90deg); transition: transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-node__dot { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; background: #a3e635; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-node__label { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #e7ebf2; } .ds-node__count { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: #71809a; background: #19212f; border: 1px solid #232b3b; border-radius: 99px; padding: 1px 7px; }

components.name: Color Swatch (active)
components.description: Square swatch in a 7-column grid; active shows a 2px ink ring.
components.css: .ds-swatch { position: relative; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 6px; background: #38bdf8; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.12s ease; } .ds-swatch:hover { transform: scale(1.12); } .ds-swatch--active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -2px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid #e7ebf2; }

components.name: Rail Section Card
components.description: Flat bordered work surface in the right rail; no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #11151e; border: 1px solid #232b3b; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px; } .ds-card__head { margin: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #71809a; }

narrative.overview: Arbolista looks like an architect's drafting table rendered in a terminal: a deep blue-black field overlaid with a faint 26px graph-paper grid and one cold-lime glow from the top-right corner. Structure is the subject; lime ink is the cursor, marking only what is live (focused panel, selected node, active tab, primary action). Monospace carries every machine-fact while two grotesques carry the human voice. Density is IDE-high but rhythm is deliberate, and the accent is rationed so the eye always knows where the work is.
keyCharacteristics: Dark blueprint surface: navy-graphite neutrals plus a faint dot/line grid and one corner glow.
Exactly one accent (electric lime) used as a live-state cursor on ~10% of any screen.
Tri-typographic: heavy display grotesque, humanist body grotesque, monospace for all data and labels.
Full borders and tonal layering for depth; shadows reserved for floating surfaces.
High density organized into bordered work surfaces (canvas + right rail), never loose floating cards.

rules.name: The One Cursor Rule
rules.body: Lime is a cursor, not a color scheme. At most ~10% of any screen, always meaning 'this is live or this is the primary action.'

rules.name: The Blueprint Grid Rule
rules.body: Page background is a fixed top-right radial lime glow at 8% over Void plus two 1px white grids at 2.2% on a 26px pitch. Panels sit on the grid as solid boards; they never repeat it.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No #000, no #fff. Every neutral is tinted toward the blueprint hue (~OKLCH hue 262, chroma 0.02 to 0.035).

rules.name: The Machine-Voice Rule
rules.body: Numbers, code, status, keys, counts and structural labels are JetBrains Mono, often uppercase with wide tracking. Language is Hanken Grotesk. Never blur the two.

rules.name: The Rare Display Rule
rules.body: Bricolage Grotesque appears only at the two title altitudes (product name, panel title).

rules.name: The Layer-Not-Lift Rule
rules.body: Reach for a lighter neutral and a hairline border before a shadow. Shadows belong to the two big boards and to transient popovers.

rules.name: The Single Glow Rule
rules.body: The only colored shadow is the lime glow under the brand mark.

dos: Do keep lime to ~10% of any screen, only on live state and the single primary action.
Do print every number, code fragment, status line, tab label and section header in JetBrains Mono, usually uppercase with 0.14 to 0.22em tracking.
Do build depth by climbing the tonal ramp (Void to Panel to Panel Raised to Elevated) with 1px hairline borders before considering a shadow.
Do recess data-entry surfaces to Void fill and shift their border to lime on focus.
Do keep the fixed blueprint background on the page floor only, with solid panels on top.
Do print dark Accent Ink text on every lime fill.
Do reveal row controls on hover and for the selected state, keeping the resting row quiet.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent hue; one lime, full stop (user-assigned node colors are data, the only place other hues appear).
Don't use #000 or #fff; every neutral is tinted toward the blueprint hue.
Don't ship the generic AI-tool look: purple-to-blue gradients on white, neon-on-black crypto sheen, the hero-metric template, or grids of identical icon-heading-text cards.
Don't spread glassmorphism; the only backdrop-filter blur is the sticky header, panels and popovers are solid.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text; emphasis comes from weight, size and the lime fill.
Don't add a colored border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a decorative stripe; the node row's 2px color tick is the only exception because it encodes data.
Don't drop-shadow buttons, chips, inputs, rows or rail sections.
Don't reach for a modal; edit inline and render errors as a line under the field.
